head.title: Somnath Dwarka 3 Days 2 Nights: Rs.10,000 pp, Real Clock
head.meta_description: The shortest honest version of both temples. 3 days 2 nights from Rs.10,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle. Includes the one fork you must choose.
head.h1: Somnath Dwarka Package 3 Days 2 Nights: Itinerary, Price and Booking
head.ctr_rationale: Competitors title on price-off and best-price. This titles on the specific decision this duration forces, which is the only differentiated angle left and the thing the buyer is actually anxious about.

explicitly_not_owned.query: somnath dwarka tour package from ahmedabad

intent_lock.differentiation_proof: Owns the Bet Dwarka versus Somnath aarti fork, which exists only at 2 nights. Option A and Option B are costed in time against the 233 km drive, the 1 pm closure and the 7 pm aarti. The 4 day page resolves the fork; this page is the fork.
intent_lock.delta_test: PASS. The decision this page owns exists only at this night count and cannot be restated on the hub or on a sibling without becoming that page's subject.
information_gain: Names the exact tradeoff a 2 night plan forces (Bet Dwarka or the 7 pm Somnath aarti) and makes the buyer choose before booking.
States the fork is what the third night removes, which converts the upsell honestly.

5_star.hotel: The Fern Sattva Resort at Dwarka, best available at Somnath

included: vehicle with driver for the full itinerary

aeo_geo.answer_snippet: A somnath dwarka package 3 days 2 nights costs Rs. 10,000 per person at the 3 star tier, Rs. 20,000 at 4 star and Rs. 25,000 at 5 star, with hotel, breakfast and your vehicle included.
quotable_first_party_claims: Rs. 10,000 per person for 2 nights at 3 star, vehicle included.
Dwarka to Somnath is 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours.
Jay Somnath sound and light show runs 7:45 pm to 8:45 pm per the Shree Somnath Trust.
aeo_geo.zero_click_defense: The summary can take the price and the distance. It cannot take the decision table, the live permit timing or the reconfirmation of festival-day schedules for a specific date. Brand sits inside the answer snippet.

@graph.name: Somnath Dwarka Package 3 Days 2 Nights
@graph.description: The shortest honest version of both temples. 3 days 2 nights from Rs.10,000 pp with hotel, breakfast and vehicle. Includes the one fork you must choose.

@graph._build_note: Totals are the per person per night rate times 2 nights and are visible in the price table on the page. No aggregateRating until real reviews are on the page.

mainEntity.name: Is 3 days enough for Somnath and Dwarka?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, and it is the shortest plan that is. Two nights gives each temple an evening and a morning, with the 233 km coastal drive on the middle day. What three days cannot also hold is Bet Dwarka plus the Somnath evening aarti on the same day.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost of a 3 days 2 nights Somnath Dwarka package?

acceptedAnswer.text: Rs. 10,000 per person at 3 star, Rs. 20,000 at 4 star and Rs. 25,000 at 5 star, hotel, breakfast and vehicle included.

mainEntity.name: How long is the drive from Dwarka to Somnath?

acceptedAnswer.text: 233 km on NH51, 5 to 6 hours through Porbandar and Veraval, before stops.
